sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104479" key="tragikw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰγῐκ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n104479.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of tragic kind,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μῦθος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2450.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Palaeph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
